summary: Iteration 2 testing completed after bug fixes. Backend YOLO+OpenCV working correctly (4/4 tests passing). CRITICAL BUG FOUND AND FIXED: Home screen category cards were rendering full-width instead of 3-column grid due to Dimensions API returning desktop width. Fixed by using percentage-based width (31%). All other bug fixes verified via code review: SVG Mask implementation correct, stroke removal correct, safe area insets implemented.
action_items: Manual testing recommended: Test full image upload flow (camera/gallery → area selection with drawing → counting → results) on actual mobile device or Expo Go app to verify SVG Mask behavior and safe area insets on Android
Verify YOLO+OpenCV counting accuracy with real industrial object photos (steel bars, tubes, profiles)
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend: YOLO11n model loaded successfully, OpenCV detection methods implemented (Hough circles, watershed, contours)
✅ Backend: All 4 API tests passing (health check + count endpoint with different categories)
✅ Frontend: Home screen card layout FIXED - changed from Dimensions.get('window') to percentage-based width (31%)
✅ Frontend: SVG Mask implementation correct (replaced evenodd Path with Mask element for proper include/exclude union)
✅ Frontend: Stroke removal correct - only current drawing path has dashed stroke, completed areas have no stroke
✅ Frontend: Safe area insets implemented correctly (useSafeAreaInsets in index.tsx, area-select.tsx, camera.tsx, results.tsx)
✅ Frontend: Bottom toolbar in area-select.tsx has paddingBottom: insets.bottom + 8
✅ All React Native components used correctly
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes
updated_files: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx (CRITICAL FIX: Changed from Dimensions.get('window').width to percentage-based width '31%' for category cards to fix full-width rendering bug)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (home screen fixed, camera navigation working, no errors)

seed_data_creation: Reused existing test image generator from iteration 1 (200x200 JPEG with 4 circular objects)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All automated tests passing. The reported bugs have been addressed: 1) Card overlapping FIXED with percentage width 2) SVG Mask implemented correctly (verified via code review) 3) Safe area insets implemented (verified via code review) 4) Stroke removal implemented (verified via code review). Full manual testing on mobile device needed to verify drawing interactions, SVG mask visual behavior, and Android navigation bar safe area.
rca_of_issue: ROOT CAUSE: Home screen category cards were rendering at full width (622px) instead of 3-column grid (~112px each) because Dimensions.get('window').width was returning desktop browser window width (1918px) instead of mobile viewport width (390px). This is a React Native Web limitation where Dimensions API doesn't respect browser device emulation viewport. FIX: Replaced calculated pixel width with percentage-based width (31%) in StyleSheet, which automatically adapts to container width. Result: Cards now render correctly in 3-column grid (111px each) with proper spacing.
